purpose: A floorplan for displaying a single business object with multiple sections. Includes object header, anchor bar, and scrollable section content.
whenToUse: For object detail pages with multiple sections
When user needs to view comprehensive information about a single entity
For Edit and Display modes of an object
whenNotToUse: For simple single-section pages — use DynamicPage
For lists of objects — use List Report
doRules: Use for object detail pages with multiple sections
Use Anchor Bar for quick navigation when many sections exist
Show object header with key facts at top
dontRules: Do not use for simple single-section pages — use DynamicPage
Do not put a Table as the only content — use List Report
Do not omit the object header

layoutGuidance.alignment: Anchor bar sticky top; sections scroll.

responsiveBehavior.XL: Anchor bar visible; sections in 2-col grid where applicable

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Anchor bar items navigate via arrow keys; Enter scrolls to section
Each section has heading; anchor bar mirrors structure
Section position announced when scrolled to

exceptions: useIconTabBar=true replaces Anchor Bar with IconTabBar
